value.found_quote: Automate recurring tasks in the background. Codex adds findings to the inbox, or automatically archives the task if there's nothing to report.
value.rationale: The page is the Automations documentation for Codex, describing how Codex automates recurring tasks in the background and adds findings to the inbox. It also states "Automations run unattended," directly matching the claim. No deprecation or sunset language is present, so it is treated as active.
